concepts.title: Equation of chord of contact of hyperbola
concepts.conceptBody:
Chord of Contact 

The equation of chord of contact of tangent drawn from a point $\text{P}\left( {{\text{x}}_{1}},{{\text{y}}_{1}} \right)$ to the hyperbola $\frac{{{x}^{2}}}{{{a}^{2}}}-\frac{{{y}^{2}}}{{{b}^{2}}}=1$ is $T=0$ where $T\equiv \frac{{{x}_{1}}}{{{a}^{2}}}-\frac{{{y}_{1}}}{{{b}^{2}}}-1$

The equation of the chord joining the points $\text{P}\equiv \left( \text{asec}{{\theta }_{1}},\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ btan}{{\theta }_{1}} \right)$ and $\text{Q}\equiv \left( \text{asec}{{\theta }_{2}},\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ btan}{{\theta }_{2}} \right)$ is

$\frac{\text{x}}{\text{a}}\text{cos}\left( \frac{{{\theta }_{1}}-{{\theta }_{2}}}{2} \right)-\frac{\text{y}}{\text{b}}\text{sin}\left( \frac{{{\theta }_{1}}+{{\theta }_{2}}}{2} \right)=\text{cos}\left( \frac{{{\theta }_{1}}+{{\theta }_{2}}}{2} \right)\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ or }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }\left| \begin{array}{*{35}{l}} \text{x} & \text{y} & 1 \\ \text{asec}{{\theta }_{1}} & \text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ btan}{{\theta }_{1}} & 1 \\ \text{asec}{{\theta }_{2}} & \text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ btan}{{\theta }_{2}} & 1 \\ \end{array} \right|=0$

examples.title: The length of the chord of the parabola $y^2=4 a x$ which passes through the vertex and makes an angle $\theta$ with the axis of the parabola, is
